headline: If You Invested $1000 In Cummins Stock 20 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
summary: Cummins (NYSE:CMI) has outperformed the market over the past 20 years by 7.8% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 17.08%. Currently, Cummins has a market capitalization of $95.79 billion.
